filing.rule: Only one claim can be processed at a time

documents.own_damage: Repair Bill and Vehicle Invoice required
documents.third_party: Repair Bill and Vehicle Invoice required

filing.coverage_condition: Claims are processed only if covered under the plan

settlements.depreciation: 5% for new cars up to 60% for cars older than 5 years
settlements.zero_dep: No depreciation if Zero Depreciation plan is active

total_loss.policy_status: Policy is marked as claimed after payout
